_publications._publicationTitle: RENOVO-NF1 accurately predicts NF1 missense variant pathogenicity.

_contextSnippet: proposing a clinically meaningful reclassification for 79% of the NF1 missense VUSs
details: Classified 79% of NF1 missense VUSs (3478 out of 4412 variants) with clinically meaningful reclassification: 2770 as pathogenic, 708 as benign, 934 as uncertain
